description_long: This is a tall, slender wooden easel with a single vertical post rising from a square base. The top features a wide, flat, rectangular platform angled upward, suitable for holding signs, placards, or display boards. The wood grain is visible, giving it a natural, dark brown finish that suggests it is made from stained hardwood. The structure is minimalistic, with no visible adjustable mechanisms or additional supports, relying on the single post for stability. The base is solid and broad enough to prevent tipping, while the platform is smooth and unadorned. This type of easel is commonly used in urban environments for displaying information, directions, or artwork in public spaces.
description: A tall, dark wooden easel with a single post and a wide, angled display platform, featuring a sturdy square base and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the single post and the edge of the angled platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled display platform and the full height of the single post.
description_view_2: Full frontal view displaying the wide, flat platform and the square base directly beneath the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the angle of the platform and the slenderness of the post.
